caption: A man with a beard, wearing a dark blue vest over a light-colored shirt, speaks into a cluster of microphones in a crowded indoor setting. He is surrounded by other people, including several women, and several microphones with logos such as "ANI" are positioned in front of him. The scene is framed by a news broadcast overlay from "NEWS 18 इंडिया" with a red and yellow "BREAKING NEWS" banner at the bottom. On-screen text includes labels like "डिप्टी CM," "मंत्री," and names such as "सब्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिंदा," "विजेन्द्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार." As the sequence progresses, a news ticker appears at the top, displaying the text "2024 में" in the first few moments, which evolves into "2024 में JDU के" and finally "2024 में JDU के साथ रहे." A timestamp in the bottom right corner consistently reads "10:05 PM" next to the "MAHARASHTRA" label.
